root_cause: Pod cannot be scheduled because required zone placement conflicts with available capacity
evidence: Cluster spans multiple zones: us-east-1a, us-east-1b
Scheduler messages indicate both zone filtering and capacity pressure
Dominant scheduler message: 0/4 nodes are available: 2 Insufficient cpu, 2 node(s) didn't match Pod's node affinity/selector.

causes.message: Pod declares hard zone-aware placement constraints
Eligible nodes in the required zone do not provide a feasible placement
Nodes in other zones are filtered out even though the cluster spans multiple zones
Pod remains Pending because zone-aware constraints conflict with available capacity

pod:cross-zone-pod: Pod repeatedly failed scheduling due to zone-aware placement constraints

likely_causes: Node affinity or topology rules restrict the pod to a zone without enough free capacity
Capacity exists in other zones, but hard placement constraints exclude them
Zone-aware placement policy is stricter than current cross-zone resource distribution
suggested_checks: Review pod affinity, anti-affinity, and topologySpreadConstraints
